author: Aditya Sasidhar
name: 8L GQA + MLP3 + Partial RoPE + 2XSA + Mixed Quant
blurb: Single-H100 non-record run with tied embeddings, GQA (8 query heads / 4 KV heads), Partial RoPE on 32 dims, XSA on the last 2 layers, FlashAttention interface, MLP 3x width, wallclock-aware warmdown over the final 20%, and late QAT over the final 15% of training. Export uses mixed quantization with zlib compression and sliding-window validation at stride 96.
